fields.label: Slug
fields.description: Lowercase page id, e.g. customer--acme-corp or doctype--sales-invoice.

fields.label: Page Type
fields.options:
Customer
Supplier
Item
Process
Doctype
Exception
Integration
People
Org

fields.label: Scope
fields.description: Who can see this page. Org = every desk user; Role = holders of the target role; User = the target user only. System Managers see everything.

fields.label: Target Role
fields.description: Role whose holders can read this page (Role scope only).

fields.label: Target User
fields.description: The only user who can read this page (User scope only). Defaults to the creator.

fields.label: Reference DocType
fields.description: ERP doctype this page is about (Customer, Supplier, Item, or a transactional doctype for Doctype-level pages).

fields.label: Reference Name
fields.description: ERP record this page is about; empty for Doctype/Process/Org-level pages.

fields.label: Summary
fields.description: One-paragraph gist (max 500 chars) inlined into chat context when the entity comes up.

fields.label: Sources
fields.description: Provenance trail: [{date, kind, ref, user}] appended on every applied update.

fields.label: Last Confirmed At
fields.description: When the content was last confirmed or refreshed; pages older than 90 days are flagged stale.

fields.label: Contradiction Flagged
fields.description: Set when an extracted update contradicted the existing body; the conflicting info is appended as a flagged section, never silently overwritten.

fields.label: Manual Links
fields.description: Human-curated [[link]] target slugs kept OUT of body_md so LLM re-ingestion (which full-replaces the body) can't clobber them. Unioned into the graph's links-to edges.

fields.label: Mirror Hash
fields.description: sha256 of the last markdown render pushed to the container mirror (Org pages only); the mirror sync diffs against it.
